summary: The diff implements a grid trading bot with ICDex integration across backend/main.mo and frontend hooks/components. REQ-2 and REQ-3 are clearly implemented. REQ-1 has a partial implementation visible in the truncated backend, but several key acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The timer-based bot loop must cancel existing open bot orders that deviate from the new grid via ICDex cancel API before placing new orders, and must enforce a maxOpenOrders limit.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated before the bot loop body is shown. While ICDex interface types (placeOrder, cancelOrder, getLevel10, ticker) and openOrderMap are defined, the actual timer callback implementation that performs grid alignment checks, cancels misaligned orders, enforces maxOpenOrders, and places new orders is cut off. The acceptance criteria for 'orders that deviate from the current grid are cancelled via ICDex cancel API' and 'number of open orders does not exceed maxOpenOrders config' cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: cancelAllOpenOrders method exposed and wired to a Cancel All button in OpenOrdersPanel
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists manual order placement and cancellation buttons in the dashboard as a non-goal (separate task). The diff adds a useCancelAllOrders hook calling cancelAllOpenOrders() and a Cancel All button in OpenOrdersPanel.

hallucinated_features.description: cancelOneOrderTest method exposed in the TradingBotActor TypeScript interface
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement mentions a cancelOneOrderTest method. It appears in the TradingBotActor TypeScript interface in useQueries.ts but was never requested.
